nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Broomehill, Western Australia
nodes.summary: Broomehill, Western Australia是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Gilbert's honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Gilbert's honeyeater
nodes.summary: Gilbert's honeyeater（Gilbert's honeyeater，学名 Melithreptus chloropsis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: Moora, Western Australia

nodes.name: Southwest Australia
nodes.summary: Southwest Australia is a biogeographic region in Western Australia.

nodes.name: 约翰·古尔德
nodes.summary: 约翰·古尔德是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联71种鸟类，包括绿棉凫、凍原豆雁、黄腹角雉等71种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Gilbert's honeyeater (Melithreptus chloropsis), also known as the Swan River honeyeater or western white-naped honeyeater, is a passerine bird of the honeyeater family Meliphagidae native to southwestern Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Gilbert's honeyeater is found in the southwest corner of Western Australia, where it ranges from Moora in the north, through the jarrah forest belt to Broomehill, the Stirling Range and along the coast to Stokes Inlet.{{cite book |title=Birds of Western Australia |author1=Serventy, D.L
